message:
runtime: RAII StreamingTasks wrapper for cancellation-safe subtask cleanup

Wraps the per-pane vendored streaming subtasks HashMap in a newtype whose
Drop impl aborts every live child. Prevents orphaned streaming subtasks
when the capture future is dismantled mid-flight — e.g. when:

- A parent scope cancels the runtime JoinHandle
- An outer select! races to another branch
- A panic unwinds through the capture loop

In those paths the existing explicit drain at the bottom of
spawn_capture_task never runs, and asupersync detaches rather than aborts
on bare JoinHandle drop, so children keep holding the mux socket,
capture_tx sender, and shutdown_flag Arc indefinitely.

The explicit drain on clean shutdown is kept as the fast path but is no
longer load-bearing for correctness. Gated on #[cfg(all(feature =
"vendored", unix))] to match the existing streaming-task surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
